overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person vehicle driving through a heavy rainstorm at night. The player navigates a multi-lane highway passing through a toll booth, urban intersections with neon signage, and elevated roadways before taking an exit ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with rocky hills and palm trees

agents.ego_description: driving on wet multi-lane highway following a beige SUV through heavy rain

notable_agents.action: beige SUV driving ahead in the same lane at steady speed

rocky terrain and hills visible through the rain on the left side
yellow and silver metal guardrails along both sides of the road
yellow and silver metal guardrails along both sides of the road
tall street lamps illuminating the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked coastal highway at night, with palm trees and rocky hills visible through the downpour. The vehicle follows a beige SUV along the multi-lane road, with street lights reflecting off the wet asphalt and guardrails lining both sides of the highway.

events.description: entering covered toll booth structure with red warning lights
exiting toll booth into open urban highway environment

agents.ego_description: slowing down to pass through the automated toll booth checkpoint

entered.detail: large concrete and metal toll booth gantry with red indicator lights overhead
high concrete walls flanking the toll booth lanes
high concrete walls flanking the toll booth lanes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered toll booth structure, temporarily sheltered from the rain between high concrete walls. After passing through the checkpoint, the scene transitions back to open road with urban buildings visible in the distance through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway approach with neon signage and traffic control

events.description: stopping at red traffic light behind a line of vehicles at the intersection
traffic light changes to green, proceeding through the intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating urban traffic, stopping at a red light behind other vehicles, then accelerating through the intersection

notable_agents.action: red sedan stopped at the traffic light ahead of ego vehicle
large truck passing through the intersection from the left

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign reading 'softsys' mounted on distant building
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
overhead traffic signal showing red then green

segments.scene_description: Driving through an urban fringe area, the vehicle approaches an intersection marked by a prominent cyan 'softsys' neon sign. The driver stops at a red light behind a red sedan, waiting as a truck passes through the intersection, then proceeds on green toward the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with concrete barriers and overpasses

events.description: accelerating onto elevated highway section with concrete barriers
changing lanes toward the right exit ramp

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on elevated highway, maneuvering between lanes toward the exit

entered.detail: solid concrete lane dividers with yellow reflective strips
solid concrete lane dividers with yellow reflective strips
large concrete overpass and bridge structures crossing overhead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle accelerates onto an elevated highway section lined with concrete barriers, passing under massive overpass structures. The urban skyline shifts from left to right as the driver changes lanes, preparing to take the exit ramp while rain continues to lash against the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with high concrete retaining walls

events.description: taking the exit ramp off the main highway into a walled corridor

agents.ego_description: navigating the curved exit ramp with reduced speed, following the road between high walls

entered.detail: high concrete retaining walls enclosing the exit ramp on both sides
high concrete retaining walls enclosing the exit ramp on both sides
concrete bridge or overpass structure at the end of the ramp

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes the exit ramp, leaving the main highway for a narrow, walled corridor that provides some shelter from the rain. High concrete retaining walls flank both sides of the curving road as the vehicle descends toward the merge point with another roadway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-lashed night, transitioning from a coastal highway into a dense, neon-lit urban environment. It begins by following a beige SUV along a wet coastal road lined with palm trees and rocky hills, before the camera passes through the temporary shelter of a concrete toll booth structure. As the vehicle emerges back into the downpour, the scene shifts toward the urban fringe where it pauses at a red light beneath a glowing cyan softsys neon sign. The camera then accelerates onto an elevated highway, weaving through lanes under massive overpasses as the city skyline shifts across the horizon. Finally, the vehicle steers off the main road and descends an exit ramp, moving into a narrow, walled corridor that shields the driver from the storm.
